'''Rich''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He was stationed at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] at the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|battle there]] and was an admirer of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="TCSWE" />
